name: Heretic Naval Raiders
description: Semi-autonomous marine infantry striking deep behind enemy lines. Fast, light, and infiltration-focused.
add_rules: Close Assault Weapons: Submachine Guns cost 25D (instead of 2 Glory).
Fast as Lightning: +1 DICE to Risky Success Roll for Dash ACTION for all models.
Let Sleeping Dogs Lie: Cannot include a War Wolf.
Light Troops: Max 2 Anointed Heavy Infantry. Max 1 Artillery Witch (even at ≥1000D).
Unseen Advance: Up to 3 non-ELITE models can gain INFILTRATOR for +10D each.

Heretic Trooper: Up to 3 non-ELITE models total in warband
Wretched: Up to 3 non-ELITE models total in warband
